name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-38
title: Scrub historical-burden tags (Plan/BUG/BACKLOG refs) from all feature spec bodies
description:
Post-merge audit reveals systemic violation of housekeeping protocol's spec audit criterion #1 (current-design only) and #2 (no documentation burden) across multiple feature specs. The pattern: every cleanup wave (Plan E migrations, Plan F cleanups, BUG/BACKLOG fixes) appended the project/item tag to the invariant body for traceability instead of leaving it in commit messages + CHANGELOG tombstones where it belongs.

ENUMERATED VIOLATIONS (HEAD 1d10c86b):

- contract/docs/spec/spec.md:62 — '(none — rabbit-workspace-map retired in CONTRACT-BACKLOG-27)' should be '(none)'
- contract/docs/spec/spec.md:116 — Inv 38 tagged '(BACKLOG-30 folded scope)'
- contract/docs/spec/spec.md:118 — Inv 39 tagged '(BACKLOG-30 F8 partial)'
- contract/docs/spec/spec.md:120,122,124,126,128,130,132,134,136 — Inv 40 through Inv 48 each tagged with '(Plan A meta-contract foundation)' / '(Plan B.1)' / '(Plan B.2)' / '(Plan B.3)' / '(Plan B.4)' / '(Plan F.3)'
- contract/docs/spec/spec.md:156 — full paragraph: 'Plan E per-feature meta-contract migration explicitly identifies contract...'
- rabbit-cage/docs/spec/spec.md:197 — '(Per contract Inv 48 / Plan F.3 there is no message-id registry; every producer supplies text, icon, and color inline at the call site.)'
- rabbit-file/docs/spec/spec.md:273 — '(Plan E.* migration)' in invariant body
- rabbit-feature/docs/spec/spec.md:297 — section heading 'B/B item materialization (RABBIT-FEATURE-BUG-7)'
- rabbit-feature/docs/spec/spec.md:330 — section heading 'Dispatcher continuity (RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-10)'
- tdd-subagent/docs/spec/spec.md:256 — Inv 29 titled 'Meta-contract sections (Plan E.* migration).'

FALSE POSITIVE to leave alone:
- rabbit-file/docs/spec/spec.md:33-35 — example outputs of the ID-generation algorithm (e.g., 'RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-17' is a sample value the algorithm produces, not a reference to a real B/B item)

SCOPE OF FIX:
- Cross-feature scrub across contract, rabbit-cage, rabbit-file, rabbit-feature, tdd-subagent specs
- Each scrub: remove the parenthetical tag, keep the invariant body unchanged otherwise; rewrite section titles to drop the (BUG-N)/(BACKLOG-N) parenthetical
- Verify no other refs were missed via grep for 'Plan [A-F]|BUG-[0-9]|BACKLOG-[0-9]|Wave [0-9]' (excluding legitimate algorithm-output examples and tombstones in CHANGELOG)
- Update each feature.json version + tdd_state pre/post cycle
- The historical context being scrubbed is preserved in (a) commit messages, (b) contract/CHANGELOG.md tombstones, (c) the original B/B items themselves

DISCIPLINE:
- Cross-feature cleanup, not single-feature touch
- Session-override + superpowers TDD pattern (like Plan F.1/F.2 publish.json and build-contract scrub waves)
- Direct push to dev (no merge-back ritual)

OPTIONAL ENHANCEMENT (consider during the wave):
- Add a contract-feature regression test 'test-spec-bodies-no-historical-tags.py' that greps every feature's spec.md for the offending pattern and fails on matches (with the false-positive allowlist hardcoded). This prevents future regressions; without it, the next wave that introduces a tag won't be caught until the next manual audit.

history.note: Cross-feature scrub complete — 20 historical-burden tags removed from 6 spec.md files; regression test test-spec-bodies-no-historical-tags.py added with hardcoded ALLOWLIST for 3 algorithm-output examples; contract Inv 49 added.
